program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Growing the oncology network across the region: agreement language and the first conditional -- propose an alliance and negotiate an institutional partnership (If we sign the agreement, we will start in March) -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 19 -- Building Partnerships in Latin America
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 19 -- Building Partnerships in Latin America

listenings.text: Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. I have good news about the partnership. The hospital in Bogota wants to build an alliance with Einstein. If we sign the agreement next month, we will start the program in March. The benefits are mutual: they will share patients, and we will share our research. If both teams commit, I am sure the partnership will be strong. Trust is the most important thing. Let us reach a final agreement this week. Talk soon, and have a good day.

Hi Sarah, this is Fernando. Thank you for the news about Bogota. I think this alliance is a great opportunity. If the terms are fair, my team will accept the agreement. We want a long-term partnership, not just one year. If we sign next month, we will visit the hospital in March. I trust their team, and I am sure the benefits will be mutual. I will send you my comments tomorrow. Let us reach an agreement soon. Talk to you later.
